creator: michael@fuckner.net
text:
Version is hardcoded in version.php and not generated while building port. So
after updating the port to 3.0.6 information in version.php still is 3.0.4

Fix: 

easy way: correct sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend/files/version.php
correct way: generate version.php while building port
How-To-Repeat: install sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend
